home.title: Our community is always at the heart of our attention

problem.title: Having trouble logging in?
problem.desc: Don't worry, Bo Chat team is here to get you back quickly

security.text: How we protect your data and keep your community safe

quickstart.text: Everything you need to set up your account and start communicating

features.text: Discover how our tools make your communication smarter and more enjoyable

personalize.text: Make Bo Chat yours – control colors, fonts, and dark mode

settings.text: Full control over your app appearance, notifications, and personal info

subscriptions.text: Everything you need to know about Bo Chat premium features and supporting our growth

questions.q: If I lose my phone, how can I recover my account without compromising my old data?
questions.a: Our vision is built on making communication a right, not a product. We use efficient open-source infrastructure to reduce costs and prioritize community trust.

questions.q: How can I customize the app interface to match my style?
questions.a: Absolutely. Bo Chat is designed to stay free. No fees, no subscriptions, no hidden surprises.

questions.q: Does the app consume a lot of storage or affect battery performance?
questions.a: Yes, with top standards. We use end-to-end encryption so only you and the recipient can read messages.

questions.q: How can I invite my friends to join?
questions.a: Yes, with top standards. We use end-to-end encryption so only you and the recipient can read messages.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
questions: If I lose my phone, how can I recover my account without compromising my old data privacy?
How can I customize the app interface to suit my personal taste?
Does the app consume a lot of storage space or affect battery performance?
How can I invite my friends to join and try the new class with you?
What are the steps to update my personal information within the app?
Can I change notification preferences at any time?
How can I manage apps connected to my account?
What security measures are available to protect my account?

joinUs.title: Join Us as a Partner
joinUs.description: Be part of the BooChat journey. Whether you're a loyal user wanting to spread our message or an investor who believes in our vision of privacy protection, we open doors for you to build the future together.
joinUs.ambassadorText: You can invite your friends or followers using referral codes
joinUs.investText: We target people who have an investment mindset and want to support BooChat
joinUs.developersText: Inviting developers to report security vulnerabilities or suggest new software features

newAccount.title: Create New Account
newAccount.step3: Enter your full name, email address, and date of birth.
newAccount.step6: Confirm your email (important for the next step).
newAccount.step7: You will receive a verification email — enter the code and tap Verify.
newAccount.errorMessage: The app shows the message 'Please enter a valid email address'.
newAccount.issue1: This happens when entering an invalid email.
newAccount.issue2: The most common cause is spaces at the beginning or end.
newAccount.issue3: Make sure there are no spaces and the email follows the correct email format.
newAccount.noCode: I didn't receive the verification code.
newAccount.foundAnswer: Did you find the answer you were looking for?
